title: RUSSIA / SUITE 702
description:
1998
Suite 702 in the Russian sector of Hotel Moskva in Moscow
Moments of Execution, a day of Suffering and Hope.
Times, they are a-changin'.
Da Vaz has actually found
"a room with a view of a special kind".

Installation "Game of Suffering and Hope" by Ben Jakober, exhibited at Muscarnok in Budapest, Hungary

Filmed on site in Hotel Moskva, Suite 702, Russian Sector, Moscow, 9.November 1998
a handmade Da Vaz production 1998
